business.bizscope.detailLead: Review scope governance and manage bound or unassigned hosts directly from this page.
business.bizscope.hero.boundHostsHint: Total hosts currently assigned to this business scope.
business.bizscope.hero.statusHint: Scope status determines whether it can continue accepting new host bindings.
business.bizscope.hero.environmentHint: Environment separates development, testing, and production ownership boundaries.
business.bizscope.boundHostsEmpty: No hosts are currently bound to this business scope.
business.bizscope.availableHostsLead: Only hosts without any business scope assignment are shown here. Binding will write back the scope snapshot automatically.
business.bizscope.availableHostsEmpty: There are no hosts available for binding right now.
business.bizscope.availableHostsLoadFail: Available hosts could not be loaded right now. Try again.
business.bizscope.hostsLoadFailed: Bound hosts could not be loaded right now. Try again.
business.bizscope.bindSuccess: Hosts were bound to the business scope.
business.bizscope.unbindConfirm: Unbind host {{hostname}} from this business scope?
business.bizscope.unbindSuccess: Host was unbound from the business scope.
